name: Spanish Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, sliced thin into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Flour the roast.
2. Brown the roast in oil on all sides.
3. Remove the roast from the pan and set aside.
4. Put the onion rings into a pot (Dutch oven).
5. Add salt and pepper to the onion rings.
6. Place the roast back on top of the onion rings, along with cloves, vinegar, bay leaf, cinnamon, catsup, and water.
7. Cover the pot and bring it to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and let simmer for about 2 1/2 hours or until the roast is tender.
9. Add grated chocolate and stir around the roast.
10. Let cook another 15 minutes.
11. Remove cloves and bay leaf before serving.
